description:
WE BMC is Western's governing biomedical engineering club.  Within it exists a design team that works on projects throughout the year and competes in year-long design competitions.  

The design team has completed several acaedemia related projets, including a Smart Toothbrush intended to improve inclusive healthcare in low-resource regions and to individuals of groups susceptible to 
insufficient oral care.  See our Rrojects tab for more information!

In terms of year-long design competitions, we recently competed in the inaugural True North Bomedical Engineering Compeition.  Teams from different univiersiites across Canada were tasked with creating a medical device to better track ACL recovery.  See our Competitions tab for more information!

focusAreas.title: Mechanical Engineering
focusAreas.description:
Computer-Aided Designing (CAD)
3D Printing (Bambu Lab, PLA, PETG, ABS, TPU)
Design for Manufacturing (DFM)
